# sdwan_scope (Resource)

This resource can manage a Scope .
  - Minimum SD-WAN Manager version: `20.15.0`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "sdwan_scope" "example" {
  name        = "west1"
  description = "West Coast Domain1"
  objects = [
    {
      object_type = "feature-profile"
      object_ids  = ["003c4e0b-a2da-486d-8ee7-0e6dd4551bae"]
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the scope

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description
- `objects` (Attributes Set) List of objects belonging to the scope (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--objects))
- `users` (Set of String) List of users who reference the scope

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the object

<a id="nestedatt--objects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `objects`

Required:

- `object_ids` (Set of String) List of object UUIDs
- `object_type` (String) Object type
  - Choices: `network-hierarchy-node`, `config-group`, `feature-profile`, `device-template`, `feature-template`, `localized-policy`, `security-policy`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import sdwan_scope.example "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
```
